hero.sub: BIBO PLB is a product platform for founders and companies. We design, engineer and launch AI services end-to-end — from the first hypothesis to a live product with users.

capabilities.title: A full-stack AI product team in one place
capabilities.sub: We combine everything it takes to move an AI idea from zero to paying users — under one roof.
capabilities.card1_text: LLM pipelines, agents, RAG systems, custom embeddings, evaluation loops. Production-grade, not demos.
capabilities.card2_text: We decide what to build and what to cut. Clear scope, strong UX, fast iteration on real users.
capabilities.card3_text: Infra, pipelines, observability. Deployed to production from day one — no handoff, no drift.
capabilities.card4_text: Positioning, landing, acquisition. We don't stop at launch — we find the channel that works.

products.title: Our own products prove we can execute
products.sub: Four AI products built and run by our team. Same discipline we bring to partner projects.
products.reputar_desc: Monitors reviews and mentions across social platforms, flags risks in real time.
products.mooly_desc: Aggregates and deduplicates real estate listings from public sources.
products.gedell_desc: Investment attractiveness analysis for Dubai real estate.
products.lem_desc: AI agent that listens to Telegram and WhatsApp groups and extracts structured data.

process.title: From first call to first users in weeks — not quarters
process.step1_text: We pressure-test the problem, map users, and cut scope to what actually matters.
process.step2_text: Architecture, UX, AI approach. One coherent product, not a bag of features.
process.step3_text: We build the MVP in weeks. Production infra, real data, no throwaway prototypes.
process.step4_text: We stay with the product — improve, measure, grow. That's how real products get built.

partnership.title: Pick the format that matches your stage
partnership.way1_text: We build your AI product or module end-to-end. You own it, we deliver it.
partnership.way2_text: We join your startup as tech and product co-founders. Equity-based. MVP to scale.
partnership.way3_text: We co-build and co-invest in AI products where our skill and your network compound.

contact.title: Tell us what you're building
contact.sub: We'll reply within a business day with a direct path forward — not a sales sequence.
contact.task_label: What do you have in mind?
contact.task_placeholder: A few sentences is enough — we'll take it from there.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BIBO PLB respects your privacy. This page describes what data we collect through this website and how we use it.
privacy.data: We collect only the information you submit through our contact form (name, company, contact details, your message). We also collect anonymized analytics — page views, country, device type — through Microsoft Clarity and/or Google Analytics if enabled.
privacy.use: We use your contact information solely to reply to your inquiry. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing.
privacy.storage: Form submissions are forwarded to a private Telegram channel managed by the BIBO PLB team. Analytics is stored by the analytics provider and is fully anonymized.
privacy.rights: You can request deletion of your data at any time by emailing hello@biboplb.pro. We will respond within 7 business days.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using biboplb.pro you agree to these terms. The site is provided as-is, without warranty.
terms.use: You may browse the site and submit inquiries through the contact form. You agree not to use the site for unlawful purposes or to disrupt its operation.
terms.ip: All content on this site — text, design, code, branding — is owned by BIBO PLB and may not be reproduced without written permission.
terms.liability: BIBO PLB is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from use of this site or its content. The information here does not constitute professional advice.
terms.changes: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site means you accept the updated terms.
